steps.title: Translate the phrase
steps.content: "3 times the value of $x$" is $3x$. "$6$ more than" that amount means add $6$.

steps.title: Write y in terms of x
Confirm the choice
steps.content: $y=9x+3$ and another alternative use slope $9$, and the remaining alternative swaps the $3$ and $6$. The correct value is $y=3x+6$, so B is correct.
